name: Modern hypergolic propulsion.
body: A non-toxic hypergolic engine for re-usable spacecraft. HTP-fuelled, fast to integrate, EU Space Act compliant — performance matched to legacy toxic systems without the handling burden.
Sized for the 350+ kg small-sat market, then scaled across the vehicle layer.

name: Orbital vehicles.
body: Re-usable in-space vehicles built around P78 propulsion. Refuelable in orbit, cislunar range from day one — sized to move payloads, service assets, and recover them across the in-space economy.
